---
name: "Phan Tich XML BHYT Theo Ho So"
description: "Dung khi can phan tich ho so XML BHYT theo ma ho so, MA_LK, file XML cu the, XML1-XML6, doi chieu du lieu, lan theo loi tu dashboard/bao cao/DocXML/Sua XML, va xac dinh duong di nghiep vu theo tung ho so."
argument-hint: "Nhap MA_LK, ma ho so, ten file XML, tab XML, truong du lieu, rule, hoac van de can doi chieu"
agent: "CDSS BHYT Agent"
model: "GPT-5 (copilot)"
tools: [read, search, execute, todo]
---

Phan tich ho so XML BHYT theo ma ho so hoac file XML cu the trong repo CDSS BHYT.

Yeu cau xu ly:

1. Xac dinh ho so dang nam o dau: file XML goc, kho luu tru, du lieu da nhap, ket qua audit, hoac bao cao.
2. Neu can, lan theo du lieu giua XML1 den XML6, dashboard, DocXML, Sua XML, bao cao va rule engine.
3. Neu nguoi dung dua MA_LK, ten file, ma rule, hoac truong du lieu, uu tien truy vet theo dau moi do.
4. Khong ket luan vu vo; neu thieu du lieu, neu ro can doc them file nao, tab nao, hay buoc nao.
5. Khi lien quan nghiep vu, doi chieu voi [dac ta he thong](../../tai_lieu/Dac_ta_he_thong_CDSS_BHYT_20260405.md) va ma nguon dang chay.

Trong cau tra loi cuoi:

- Noi ro ho so/file dang phan tich.
- Noi ro du lieu da xac nhan duoc tu XML hoac ma nguon.
- Noi ro ket noi giua XML, man hinh, rule, va bao cao neu co.
- Neu co bat thuong, neu ra gia thuyet nguyen nhan kha nghi nhat va buoc kiem tra tiep theo ngan gon nhat.
